category_sources: source_facts.description says CDK provides predefined curses widgets for apps; official Invisible Island page describes CDK as a curses widget library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cdk; official page title is CDK - Curses Development Kit.
docs_sources: Official Invisible Island CDK page has Documentation links; official manpage index documents CDK and cdk5-config.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Invisible Island CDK site provides source downloads and archives but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official CDK page describe curses widgets for applications; official manpage index lists CDK widget APIs.
